message:
fix(runtime): prevent flaky resize coalescer fairness test (bd-3dy1o)

Set hard_deadline_ms=10000 in the test to prevent wall-clock elapsed time
between coalescer construction and handle_resize from exceeding the default
100ms hard deadline, which would trigger an immediate apply and clear
pending_size before the assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
